arts.ttl: Preview: Bristol City vs. Hull City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Bristol City and Hull City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Former Bristol City boss lands new managerial job in Belgium five years after Ashton Gate exit
arts.sum: Former Bristol City head coach Lee Johnson has landed a surprise new managerial role, with the 43-year-old appointed as interim head coach of Belgian club Lommel SK. After just over a year out of management, Johnson is now back in the dugout as the interim head coach of Lommel SK.

arts.ttl: “Everyone is in disarray” – Hull City owner praised for having rivals on strings and destroying the enemy
arts.sum: Hull City owner Acun Ilıcalı has been praised for the work he’s done with Fenerbahçe, and his ‘dismantling’ of rivals Galatasaray. Fanatik provide comments from Samsunspor president Yuksel Yildirim today in which he praises the Hull City owner, who he credits as being the driving force being Fenerbahçe’s current success. Ilıcalı is the current vice-president The post “Everyone is in disarray” – Hull City owner praised for having rivals on strings and destroying the enemy appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Hull City handed Bristol City fitness boost as boss sets Tigers Ashton Gate challenge
arts.sum: Having won at Sheffield United and Sunderland, playing at other grounds where teams have struggled to get points this season will not offer any fear for City, but Selles is keen to warn his players that while they've been good away from home in recent months with four wins from six, they also failed to turn up early on at Burnley and were out of the game after 20 minutes. City will head to Ashton Gate looking to back-up Tuesday night's crucial win over Plymouth Argyle, a result which moved them five points away from danger, but they'll face a Robins outfit firmly entrenched in the play-off race, though ending their home hoodoo has lifted spirits after the disappointment of Cardiff a week earlier.
